claims.claim: Purpose: station-facing version of the T1 spine theorem, written as explicit claims with mechanisms, boundaries, and kill conditions.

axiom_hits.label: Grace Conclusion
axiom_hits.statement: Axiom 15: External grace is the only mechanism for sign-flip.
axiom_hits.kill_condition: Internal self-operation can flip moral sign without external grace.

axiom_hits.label: Observer Theorem
axiom_hits.statement: Observer is derived from levels 0-3, not primitive.
axiom_hits.kill_condition: Observation can be removed without loss of actualization/accountability structure.

axiom_hits.label: Consciousness Theorem
axiom_hits.statement: Consciousness is derived from levels 0-3.
axiom_hits.kill_condition: Consciousness is either unnecessary to the chain or reducible without remainder to non-observer substrate.
terms: consciousness is derived from levels 0-3. consciousness,observer theorem level_4

axiom_hits.label: Grace Function G(t)
axiom_hits.statement: Sign Conservation Theorem T8.1, three independent derivation paths, and Lagrangian structural confirmation upgrade grace from asserted axiom to derived necessity.
axiom_hits.kill_condition: A closed moral system self-generates sign reversal or non-trivial steady state without external grace.

axiom_hits.label: Sign Conservation Theorem
axiom_hits.statement: sigma prime = U(self) times sigma = (-1) times sigma = sigma. Self-operations preserve sign; grace must be non-unitary and external.
axiom_hits.kill_condition: Show a valid self-operation that changes moral sign without external non-unitary grace.

axiom_hits.label: Soteriological Limit
axiom_hits.statement: In product-form chi, entropy drives toward zero; for chi > 0 as t approaches infinity, J_grace must be nonzero. Without external grace, steady state is chi=0.
axiom_hits.kill_condition: A non-trivial positive steady state exists in the closed system with J_grace=0.

axiom_hits.label: Grace Phase Transition
axiom_hits.statement: R-sweep from negative to positive produces a threshold-dependent discrete phase transition from chi<0 to chi>0 when J_grace crosses threshold.
axiom_hits.kill_condition: The sign change is smooth, internally generated, or reversible without external energy input.

axiom_hits.label: System Consistency
axiom_hits.statement: The 188-axiom system is internally consistent — no axiom contradicts another, no derivation leads to both P and ¬P.

axiom_hits.label: Axiom Independence
axiom_hits.statement: No axiom in the system can be derived from the others — each is logically independent.
terms: no axiom in the system can be derived from the others — each is logically independent.

axiom_hits.label: The Logos Theorem
axiom_hits.statement: All 188 axioms derive from, depend on, and return to the Logos.
terms: all 188 axioms derive from, depend on, and return to the logos.

claims.claim: Claim: A corrupted system cannot reconstruct its own uncorrupted reference state using only operations closed over the corrupted class.

axiom_hits.label: Moral Physics Block
axiom_hits.statement: Axioms 10-12: Humans have fixed moral sign and cannot self-flip.
axiom_hits.kill_condition: Moral facts are not real, or sign can self-flip through effort, will, or technique.

axiom_hits.statement: Observer is derived from levels 0-3, not primitive.
axiom_hits.kill_condition: Observation can be removed without loss of actualization/accountability structure.

axiom_hits.kill_condition: Consciousness is either unnecessary to the chain or reducible without remainder to non-observer substrate.
terms: consciousness is derived from levels 0-3. consciousness,observer theorem level_4

axiom_hits.label: Trinity Closure at N=3
axiom_hits.statement: Trinity closure at N equals 3.
axiom_hits.kill_condition: Subject-object-relation adjudication closes with fewer or more than three necessary persons without loss.

axiom_hits.label: Grace Function G(t)
axiom_hits.statement: Sign Conservation Theorem T8.1, three independent derivation paths, and Lagrangian structural confirmation upgrade grace from asserted axiom to derived necessity.
axiom_hits.kill_condition: A closed moral system self-generates sign reversal or non-trivial steady state without external grace.

axiom_hits.label: NT Ceiling Non-Derivability
axiom_hits.statement: The Sermon on the Mount articulates a moral standard non-derivable from cooperation-substrate; love your enemies cannot be produced by game theory, reciprocity, or evolutionary fitness.
axiom_hits.kill_condition: Find another ethical system that independently derives love your enemies from first principles without Jesus or Christian tradition.

axiom_hits.label: Coherence Cannot Self-Increase

axiom_hits.statement: "N_observers = 3 is the minimal closure model for Subject-Object-Relation adjudication."

axiom_hits.statement: The 188-axiom Theophysics chain is complete and closed. No further axioms are required.

claims.claim: Mechanism: If every self-generated operation maps error states to error states, then any finite composition of those operations also maps error states to error states.

axiom_hits.statement: sigma prime = U(self) times sigma = (-1) times sigma = sigma. Self-operations preserve sign; grace must be non-unitary and external.
axiom_hits.kill_condition: Show a valid self-operation that changes moral sign without external non-unitary grace.

axiom_hits.label: Soteriological Limit
axiom_hits.statement: In product-form chi, entropy drives toward zero; for chi > 0 as t approaches infinity, J_grace must be nonzero. Without external grace, steady state is chi=0.
axiom_hits.kill_condition: A non-trivial positive steady state exists in the closed system with J_grace=0.

axiom_hits.label: Grace Phase Transition
axiom_hits.statement: R-sweep from negative to positive produces a threshold-dependent discrete phase transition from chi<0 to chi>0 when J_grace crosses threshold.
axiom_hits.kill_condition: The sign change is smooth, internally generated, or reversible without external energy input.

axiom_hits.label: Substrate Requirement
axiom_hits.statement: "Information requires a substrate for instantiation."

axiom_hits.label: Coherence Cannot Self-Increase
axiom_hits.statement: "In a closed system, coherence cannot spontaneously increase. dC/dt ≤ 0."
terms: "in a closed system, coherence cannot spontaneously increase. dc/dt ≤ 0."

axiom_hits.label: Observation Requirement
axiom_hits.statement: "Empirically meaningful physics requires at least one locus of phenomenal appearance for outcome attribution."

axiom_hits.label: Grace External to System
axiom_hits.statement: "Grace function G ext (t) is an exogenous coupling term that opens an otherwise closed moral/coherence subsystem."

axiom_hits.label: Grace Operator Definition
axiom_hits.statement: “Grace operator G total = I identity ⊗ G σ , where G σ maps σ: −1 → +1 while preserving identity register N S .”

axiom_hits.label: The Chain Is Complete
axiom_hits.statement: The 188-axiom Theophysics chain is complete and closed. No further axioms are required.
terms: the 188-axiom theophysics chain is complete and closed. no further axioms are required.

claims.claim: Boundary: This proves need for external reference-bearing input under the model; it does not yet prove the input is personal, incarnate, or Christian.

axiom_hits.label: Grace Conclusion
axiom_hits.statement: Axiom 15: External grace is the only mechanism for sign-flip.
axiom_hits.kill_condition: Internal self-operation can flip moral sign without external grace.

axiom_hits.label: Self-Transformation Impossible
axiom_hits.statement: Self-transformation is impossible; works do not save.
axiom_hits.kill_condition: A self-generated operation flips moral sign without external input.

axiom_hits.label: External Grace Required
axiom_hits.statement: External intervention is required: Grace.
axiom_hits.kill_condition: A closed system reaches non-trivial positive chi without external grace input.

axiom_hits.label: Grace as Non-Unitary External Operator
axiom_hits.statement: Grace is a non-unitary external operator.

axiom_hits.label: February 14 Boundary
axiom_hits.statement: Formal proof boundary: Trinity isomorphism, free will, God as mathematical axiom. Do not push below presuppositions.
axiom_hits.kill_condition: The framework reasons below its own presuppositions without circularity or contradiction.
